'''Quellegh Industrial''' was a company that produced [[Stun/Legends|non-lethal]] [[Droid/Legends|droid]]-mounted weaponry during the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Jedi Civil War]]. Quellegh aggressively marketed its products toward rich despots and was close to becoming the standard for publicly-traded stun weaponry designed for use by droids. Its products included the [[stun ray]] and the [[advanced stun ray]], which was only available through special order. During the [[Galactic War]], which occurred over three hundred [[Standard year/Legends|years]] later, Quellegh Industrial made powerful [[Ray shield/Legends|energy shield]] [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|generators]] that could be installed on [[Starship/Legends|starships]].

==History==
Active by the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[3956 BBY]],<ref name="KotorCG">''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]''</ref> during the [[Jedi Civil War]] fought between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire]], Quellegh Industrial was a company that produced [[Stun/Legends|non-lethal]] [[Droid/Legends|droid]]-mounted weapons. By that [[Time/Legends|time]], the company was close to becoming the standard in the types of publicly-traded stun weapons that were designed for installation on droids. Quellegh aggressively marketed its [[stun ray]]s to wealthy despots, a strategy that company officials stated was responsible for Quellegh's success. The company's [[advanced stun ray]]s were mostly used by elite [[Trooper/Legends|troops]] affiliated with governments.<ref name="KotOR" /> Over three hundred years later,<ref name="TimeDifference">The [[Jedi Civil War]] took place in 3,956 BBY according to the ''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]''. {{TOR dates|2}} The [[Galactic War]] starts during Act II of the game, which means that there was at least three hundred and fourteen years between the Jedi Civil War and the energy shield generator's production.</ref> during the [[Galactic War]] fought between the Republic and another [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|Sith Empire]], the company produced powerful [[Ray shield/Legends|energy shield]] [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|generator]] for installation on [[Starship/Legends|starships]].<ref name="TOR" />

==Products==
One of the droid-mounted weapons sold by Quellegh Industrial was a stun ray that could be purchased for around 300 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] from [[Merchant/Legends|merchants]] who stocked the weapon. The company also provided an aftermarket modification to the weapon known as an advanced stun ray, which was more effective at stunning living beings. The advanced stun ray was much more expensive to produce and was only available from the company by special order. However, some merchants were able to obtain the weapon, which was sold for around 900 credits when it was available.<ref name="KotOR" /> During the Galactic War, Quellegh Industrial produced high-quality energy shield generators for use on starships.<ref name="TOR" />

==Behind the scenes==
Quellegh Industrial was first mentioned in ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'', a [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] produced by [[BioWare]]. In the game, the company was only mentioned in the item descriptions for the stun ray and the advanced stun ray.<ref name="KotOR" /> In [[2011]], the company was briefly referenced in ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'', BioWare's MMORPG sequel to ''Knights of the Old Republic''. Its only mention is in the description for the Quellegh Industrial Energy Shield, a powerful shield generator that could be equipped on players' personal starships. The schematic that allows players to create the shield generator can only be obtained through high-level [[Slicer/Legends|slicing]] crew skill missions.<ref name="TOR" />
